hierarchy.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-extrabold tracking-tighter leading-none
hierarchy.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl font-bold tracking-tight leading-tight
hierarchy.countdown_large: text-6xl sm:text-8xl font-black font-mono tracking-tighter text-coral-500

typography.instructions: Never use generic 'Inter' for headings. Use JetBrains Mono for all timers, countdowns, bid numbers, and financial figures. Ensure headings have tight tracking (tracking-tighter) for a premium, modern feel.

colors.instructions: Strictly adhere to the dark graphite/near-black theme with crisp white areas. Use Signal Green (#CCFF00) EXCLUSIVELY for successful states, live contracts, and 'live' indicators. Use Coral Orange (#FF4500) EXCLUSIVELY for urgency, countdowns, and Rescue Mode. Buttons should often be crisp solid white with black text for high contrast, or Signal Green for primary 'Go' actions.

spacing_and_layouts.spacing_scale: Use generous padding: p-6, p-8 for cards; p-12, p-24 for layout sections.
spacing_and_layouts.border_radius: Premium rounded cards: Use rounded-2xl or rounded-3xl for main containers, rounded-full for pills and action buttons.

grids.marketing_hero: Asymmetric bento grid (grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 gap-8) overlapping video thumbnails with bold typography.
grids.marketplace_feed: Dense, highly scannable grid (grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-6). Use strict h-full on children.
grids.live_bid_room: Split pane layout. Left: Video Brief & Details. Right: Live incoming bids feed. (md:grid-cols-[2fr_1fr]).

spacing_and_layouts.instructions: One dominant action per screen. Friction is fiction. Keep forms sparse, large inputs, and highly legible. Use pure HTML/Tailwind for marketing layouts, and Shadcn for complex interactive forms inside the dashboard.

surfaces_and_visual_enhancers.cards: Solid graphite backgrounds (#1A1A1A) with 1px subtle white borders (border-white/10). No muddy glassmorphism for functional areas.
surfaces_and_visual_enhancers.live_pulses: Use a 'Tracing Beam' or glowing border effect for cards that are 'CONTRACT LIVE'. Add animate-pulse to a signal-green dot for live bids.
surfaces_and_visual_enhancers.shadows: Keep shadows restrained. Rely on 1px borders and contrast for separation. No soft glowing drop-shadows unless it's a specific live status emitter.
surfaces_and_visual_enhancers.textures: Subtle noise overlay (grain) on the marketing hero background to break digital flatness.

motion.philosophy: Restrained motion. Apple-level polish with sports-interface energy.
motion.interactions: Hover states must have crisp transitions. Buttons should have a slight scale down (active:scale-95).
motion.live_bids: Incoming bids should slide down and fade in (Framer Motion: initial y: -20, opacity: 0).
motion.countdowns: Timers should tick strictly. Add a subtle 'heartbeat' scale effect on the colon or last second when under 1 hour.

components.buttons: Pill-shaped (rounded-full). Primary: bg-[#CCFF00] text-black hover:bg-[#B3E600]. Secondary: bg-white text-black hover:bg-gray-200. Destructive/Urgent: bg-[#FF4500] text-white.
components.badges: Use rounded-full, px-3 py-1. Live: border border-[#CCFF00] text-[#CCFF00]. Urgent: border border-[#FF4500] text-[#FF4500].
components.inputs: Large, accessible. bg-[#121212] border-white/20 text-white focus:border-[#CCFF00] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#CCFF00] h-12 or h-14.
components.video_thumbnails: Large, 16:9 or 9:16 aspect ratios. Must have an overlay gradient at the bottom (bg-gradient-to-t from-black/80 to-transparent) to ensure white text legibility.

hero_creator.description: Podcast/Creator studio setup, use as main marketing background or creator persona.

video_editor_1.description: Video clipper working in a dark room with dual monitors. Use for Clipper Directory or Onboarding.

video_editor_2.description: Team editing video. Good for agency clipper profile.

action_footage_1.description: Snowboarding extreme sports action. Use as demo video thumbnail for projects.

action_footage_2.description: Motocross flying action. Use as demo video thumbnail for projects.

action_footage_3.description: Kitesurfing trick. Use as demo video thumbnail for projects.

media.instructions: Use these exact URLs for imagery. Do not use generic placeholders like via.placeholder.com. When a brand logo is needed, use Lucide React icons (e.g., Twitch, Youtube) or style generic shapes sharply.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure text over images uses dark overlays or text-shadows. The Signal Green (#CCFF00) and Coral Orange (#FF4500) must only be used with Black/Dark backgrounds for readability, or with Black text if they are background colors.
accessibility.testing: All interactive elements (buttons, form fields, tabs, project cards) MUST have data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='post-clip-btn').

3d_and_creative_libraries.framer_motion: Mandatory for live bid arrivals, countdown updates, and page transitions.
3d_and_creative_libraries.sonner: Use for all toast notifications. Toasts must be styled dark with green/orange accents depending on success/urgent states.

universal_guidelines_for_main_agent: Do not build generic centered layouts. Use asymmetry and strong left-alignment.
Do not use transparent dropdown menus. Ensure all popovers/dropdowns have solid #1A1A1A backgrounds with borders.

No crypto jargon in the UI. Replace any Web3 terminology with simple marketplace terms (e.g., 'Lock Deadline Bond' -> 'Confirm & Lock'). The 'Powered by Solana' badge should be a subtle trust indicator in the footer/hero.
Never apply universal transition (transition: all). Target specific properties (transition-colors, transition-transform).
No AI emojis in text (e.g., no 🚀 or 🔮). Keep the tone ultra-professional, urgent, and energetic.
pages_and_features: Landing Page: High-impact hero, animated 'live' marketplace preview, 'How it Works' steps, 'Powered by Solana' badge.
Customer Dashboard: Create project wizard, active clips with large countdowns.
Live Job Marketplace: Filterable jobs for clippers, real-time bid UI.
Clipper Dashboard / Bidding Room: Live pulsing UI to submit bids, lock bond, and upload final cuts.
Clip Room: The collaborative space with the giant 24-hour ticking clock, version history, and chat.
